title: Yellow Squad Animated Series
description: Yellow Squad Animated Series is a six-month 2D animation campaign that turns Collective Noun traits into recurring characters, growing Yellow Collective’s presence on TikTok and other social platforms through consistent, shareable content.
details: Yellow Squad Animated Series is a six-month content initiative by Kimmydeuk designed to make Yellow Collective more visible, recognizable, and approachable across social media. Centered on “The Yellow Squad,” a cast of characters based on specific Collective Noun head traits, the project will produce a steady stream of 2D animations, illustrated skits, carousel posts, short loops, and relatable story-driven content that bridges crypto-native culture with a broader mainstream audience. TikTok will serve as the primary growth channel, with content cross-posted to Instagram, X, and Farcaster, supported by a consistent posting cadence and monthly impact reports covering follower growth, views, and engagement. Building on the creator’s past experience leading the Lil Bean campaign for Lil Nouns DAO and an early Yellow pilot that showed promising traction, the series aims to give Yellow Collective a stronger social identity, create characters people can recognize and follow, and invite more people into the community through accessible, entertaining, CC0 animated content.
